data.title: Baboo Factory
data.synopsis:
Baboo Factory is a very short anime, which is aired in the middle of a cooking program called Wagamanma Kitchen. The characters in Baboo Factory are cute alien creatures, called Baboos, based on the PlayStation game Astronoka. The Baboo in Astronoka were 3D polygon characters, but the Baboo Factory Baboo are normal 2D anime characters. The Baboo don't speak a human language. They just say "baboo baboo", and there are Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: Jueshi Shen Huang
data.synopsis:
Jing Yunxiao was once the supreme Emperor of Samsara on the Dragon Territory Continent. When faced with a conspiracy, he used the Five-Turn Samsara Technique to be reborn as a young man from the Jing family of Hongye Town. Drawing on his past life memories, Jing Yunxiao helped the Jing family overcome the threat of Black Dragon Village, but his grandfather, Jing Yufeng, was also seriously injured. 

Desperate, Jing Yunxiao shouldered the responsibility of saving his family and journeyed alone to Huangshi City in search of medicine. Misfortunes never come singly. The Jing family, originally an aristocratic family in the capital of Baizhan Kingdom, retreated to Hongye Town to escape the pursuit of the God of War Palace. Jing Yunxiao's reappearance caught the attention of the God of War Palace. To eliminate the root of the problem, the God of War Palace dispatched the assassin organization, the Dark Feather Palace, to Huangshi City to assassinate Jing Yunxiao. 

Meanwhile, Jing Yunxiao, in pursuit of medicine, defeated geniuses from all sides at the Hidden Dragon Competition and bravely entered the Thousand Machines Treasure to win the heart of the icy beauty Mu Shishi. While astonishing everyone with his skills, he also made enemies with many sects. With the sects seeking revenge in front and the Dark Feather Palace hunting behind, how Jing Yunxiao can protect his family and defeat this powerful enemy has become a mystery...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Kunshu-sama ni Muneyake
data.synopsis:
Aria's world is thrown into chaos when Crown Prince Julius, the brilliant but insufferable royal she's sworn to protect as Captain of his Guard, announces her as his future bride. Stunned, Aria confronts him, and Julius offers a way out: if she can defeat him in any competition before the wedding in six months, he'll cancel the engagement. But with Julius' unmatched skills, winning won't be easy. Can Aria outsmart the talented prince and reclaim her life?

(Source: WEBTOONS)

titles.title: Resourceful Victoria: Former Operative Rebuilds Her Life
手札が多めのビクトリア

data.title: Tefuda ga Oome no Victoria
data.title_japanese: 手札が多めのビクトリア
title_synonyms: Resourceful Victoria: Former Operative Rebuilds Her Life
data.synopsis:
In an age when spies act behind the scenes in every land, Chloe spends her days successfully carrying out even the most difficult missions due to her unparalleled disguise skills and martial arts abilities. However, after the betrayal of her boss, she suddenly disappears—as Chloe plans to redo her life as the ordinary citizen Victoria in the neighboring kingdom of Ashberry, striving for a "normal" life. However, Victoria's peaceful life is abruptly cut short as she begins to get involved with many people. In this new land, her experiences and abilities from her days as a spy come in far more useful than she ever expected!! On the other hand, the second prince and the pursuer of the organization amongst others take an interest in Victoria's strength, and many shadows close in on the one with all the cards in her hand...!

(Source: Yen Press)

titles.title: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
Chronicles of Grace and Grudges in the Primordial Age

data.title: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
title_synonyms: Chronicles of Grace and Grudges in the Primordial Age
data.synopsis:
Qin Feng, a young man hailed as a once-in-a-millennium genius of the Wuji Kingdom, suffered the humiliation of his entire family being framed and wiped out, leaving him the sole survivor. After his martial meridians were destroyed, he was abandoned in a small, marginalized sect to fend for himself. Driven by a desire for power and revenge, he endured much hardship and bullying, with only his kind-hearted second senior sister, sharing his fate, offering him protection. Unbeknownst to everyone, Qin Feng had already secretly embarked on a difficult path of physical cultivation. 

Upon learning that three members of his sect could study at the Heavenly Dao Academy, and with the spots already secured, he no longer tolerated his fate. When humiliated again by the sect's genius, Yun Tianyu, he unleashed his physical cultivation identity, brutally beating Yun Tianyu and shocking everyone. He then took the initiative, repeatedly teaching Yun Tianyu a lesson and openly challenging the protective First Elder, vowing to secure a spot at the Heavenly Dao Academy, for only through this could he become stronger. To prevent his disciple from being further humiliated, they agreed to a contest in seven days, the winner of which would receive the spot to study at the Heavenly Dao Academy. During this process, Yun Tianyu broke through his cultivation level and unexpectedly became a Holy Son, becoming the object of everyone's admiration. Everyone thought he would win easily. Even his second senior sister advised him to give up and offered to give him her own spot, but Qin Feng refused. In just a few days, Qin Feng also received the Holy Man's inheritance. While shouldering the responsibility of saving humanity, he began to secretly undergo hellish cultivation.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Mangzhong
data.synopsis:
A naughty boy had to stay in a young female teacher's office, receiving her separate and silent education. Finally, he decided to grow up as an obedient good student.

(Source: Vimeo)

data.title: Kaze wo Tsugumono
data.synopsis:
Set in June of 1863, the story follows a man with no memory who is brought to the Mibu Roushigumi headquarters in Kyoto. Taken in by vice-commander Souji Okita, he is given the name Jinsuke Tachikawa and begins life as a member of the group. As the Mibu Roushigumi—later known as the Shinsengumi—gain prominence amid the turmoil of the late Edo period, Jinsuke and his comrades are swept up in the era's upheaval. When Jinsuke finally regains all his memories, the world around him is forever changed.

(Source: MAL News)
data.background: Kaze wo Tsugumono aired on CBC and TBS' Agaru Anime block.
